title: Salty Crunchy Japanese Tomato Salad
description: A quick, salty and crunchy salad featuring vine tomatoes, cucumber and a sesame vinaigrette, perfect for a sattvic-friendly lunch.
instructions: Wash the tomatoes and cucumber under cool running water.
Cut the tomatoes into wedges and the cucumber into thin slices.
In a small bowl whisk together soy sauce, sesame oil, rice vinegar, grated ginger, minced garlic and honey until well combined.
Pour the dressing over the tomato and cucumber slices and gently toss to coat.
Sprinkle toasted sesame seeds over the salad and toss again to distribute evenly.
Let the salad sit for 2 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Meanwhile, if desired, sprinkle chopped cilantro on top.
Serve immediately on a chilled plate for a refreshing crunch.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 1 day.
Enjoy the quick, salty, crunchy Japanese tomato salad.
